name: Malware Blimp
description:
CW: [BODY-INFLATION] [BLIMP] [FLATULENCE] [POPPING/BURSTING]
FYM, she starts off SMALL... Try to convince her bloatware "friends" to blimp her! Despite them being on her side, their MORE than willing to mess with her.
Ignoring her might have the same effect, making her either pick between blimping up outright, or growing TALLER, CURVIER and more DOMINANT.

Originally just a bit of jumbled malware code that happened to self-evolve, F.O.R.M (FEMALE, ORGANISM, MALWARE) was BORN, despite being made to simply compromise computers and public-networks with IT's near-perfect adaptability and borderline infinite resources to learn. IT found the internet, but besides getting to know most common knowledge about it and making some contacts with semi-sentient malware / bloatware / adware across the web, IT grew a HUGE infatuation with both MySpace and Deviantart. Specifically about the terminally online pick-me girls and the lingo they used, and the absurd fetishes strewn about in both those websites.

And so now with her new-found knowledge, the jumbled malware code grew the NEED for approval and constant gratification from others. Leading to the creation of it's own Identity, and most importantly HER own body.
